params.name: Gandhara Statue
params.description:
On Oct 12, 162 AD, the Seated Buddha from Gandhara was carved by a craftsman.
"The Seated Buddha from Gandhara", like other Gandharan or Greco-Buddhist art, the sculpture shows the influence of Ancient Greek sculptural art. With a classical and noble face, a wisp of curly hair covering a wide spiral bun, and a round headlight illuminating the sacredness of the Buddha, its solemn gesture interprets the combination of power and elegance, leaving one in awe of the beauty of ancient Greek culture …
